metadata.description: CLI and agent skills for proactively triaging GitHub PR review comments and closing clear findings

plugins.name: resolve-reviews
plugins.description: Proactively triage all PR review comments, close clear findings, ask only for judgment calls, and watch until quiet

plugins.name: resolve-agent-reviews
plugins.description: Proactively triage PR review bot findings, close clear findings, ask only for judgment calls, and watch until quiet

plugins.name: resolve-human-reviews
plugins.description: Proactively triage human PR review comments, close clear findings, ask only for judgment calls, and watch until quiet
